name: Xinyaqiang Silicon Chemistry Co.,Ltd
summary: Xinyaqiang Silicon Chemistry Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells organic silicon methylsilane and phenyl products. It offers hexamethyldisiloxane, iodotrimethylsilane, chlorotrimethylsilane, hexamethyldisilane, diethoxydimethylsilane, dimethoxydimethylsilane, phenyltrichlorosilane, dichlorodiphenylsilane, dichlorodimethylsilane, trimethylethoxysilane, methyltrimethoxysilane, and methyltriethoxysilane; 1,3-divinyltetramethyldisilazane; 1,3-diethenyl-1,1,3,3-tetramethyldisiloxane; N,1,1,1-tetramethyl-N-(trimethylsilyl)silylamine; 1,1,1,3,3,3-hexamethyldisilazane; and 1,3-Bis(trimethylsilyl)urea. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Suqian, China.
